title: cottage on shared land
description:
For Rent – Fragrance-free, separate, partially furnished, one bedroom, one bathroom cottage on shared land.
North Skagit County, close to the highway, but rural.

My wonderful renters have moved on, so the cottage will be available as soon as we make sure it’s clean and in good condition. Like I said, they’ve been great, so I am expecting the cottage will be available soon after that.

$700 month includes water, recycling, and trash pickup. A mini split was installed last fall, so if you heat with that and the woodstove then electricity is included. If you add a bunch of space heaters, we’ll renegotiate. Renter is responsible for providing their own wood, but kindling and fallen wood can be picked up on the property.

This will be a month to month contract. Pets negotiable on a pet by pet basis. No smoking or vaping allowed. No fragrances of any sort. This last one is important and includes all fragranced products, not just perfumes, so the renter(s) and their guests will need to be using fragrance free personal and household products only.

The light is good and the furnishings are comfortable, antique, and fragrance free. While there is furniture,
there are no linens or kitchenware. There is the potential for shared organic garden space. A renter with truly fragrance free
clothing could share the laundry facilities in the main house.

Note, If you have applied and we have been in contact, but now I am not replying, there may be a problem with emails through Craigslist. Contact me through missed connections if we haven’t exchanged phone numbers.

title: cottage on shared land
description:
For Rent – Fragrance-free, separate, partially furnished, one bedroom, one bathroom cottage on shared land.
North Skagit County, close to the highway, but rural.

My wonderful renters have moved on, so the cottage will be available as soon as we make sure it’s clean and in good condition. Like I said, they’ve been great, so I am expecting the cottage will be available soon after that.

$1500 month includes water, recycling, and trash pickup. A mini split was installed last fall, so if you heat with that and the woodstove then electricity is included. If you add a bunch of space heaters, we’ll renegotiate. Renter is responsible for providing their own wood, but kindling and fallen wood can be picked up on the property.

This will be a month to month contract. Pets negotiable on a pet by pet basis. No smoking or vaping allowed. No fragrances of any sort. This last one is important and includes all fragranced products, not just perfumes, so the renter(s) and their guests will need to be using fragrance free personal and household products only.

The light is good and the furnishings are comfortable, antique, and fragrance free. While there is furniture,
there are no linens or kitchenware. There is the potential for shared organic garden space. A renter with truly fragrance free
clothing could share the laundry facilities in the main house.

Note, If you have applied and we have been in contact, but now I am not replying, there may be a problem with emails through Craigslist. Contact me through missed connections if we haven’t exchanged phone numbers.

Nestled among trees on the north side of Bellingham, Canterbury Court Apartments offer a serene retreat surrounded by lush greenery and thoughtfully maintained landscapes. Meandering garden paths, wide-open lawns, and vibrant seasonal blooms invite residents to unwind and enjoy the outdoors. Relax by the community pond where ducks drift peacefully and take in the nature that surrounds you. Each spacious apartment is designed for comfort, with large windows that welcome in natural light, ample closet space, in-unit washers and dryers, and bedrooms comfortably sized to fit a queen-size bed. Residents enjoy thoughtful amenities including free parking, a well-equipped gym, an indoor heated pool, hot tub, and a dry sauna- ideal for cozy Pacific Northwest days. At Canterbury Court Apartments, you’re close to everything- but it feels like a world apart.

Ironworks at Old Town | 711 Astor Street | Westview Real Estate, Inc

Welcome to Ironworks at Old Town - downtown Bellingham's newest and most exciting residential addition, thoughtfully introduced as part of the multi-year revitalization of the historic Old Town neighborhood.

Designed to capture sweeping views of Bellingham Bay, this meticulously crafted community blends modern luxury with unbeatable walkability. Step outside your door to enjoy easy proximity to local shops, dining, and everyday conveniences - all just moments away.

Inside, elevated finishes and refined details create a living experience that feels both sophisticated and welcoming. Residents enjoy premium amenities including nearby parking, air conditioning in every unit, a stunning rooftop terrace, a dedicated dog-washing station, secure package room, stylish TV lounge, and more.

Be among the first to call Ironworks home - and experience Old Town living at its finest.

Community Info
Woodrose Apartments is pleased to offer senior affordable living for ages 62+. Age and income restrictions apply).

Nestled in the charming neighborhood of Bellingham, Washington, Woodrose Senior Affordable Apartments is where change meets opportunity. Our senior affordable living community offers spacious 1 & 2 bedroom apartments complete with fully equipped kitchens and your own private patio. Take advantage of our business center or spend time in our resident social lounge during our planned activities. With a great location near public transportation, shopping, and medical facilities, Woodrose Senior Affordable Apartments is where you want to be.
Pet Policy
Dogs and cats, including puppies and kittens under one (1) year old, are welcome at our community. All pet residents must have their health check and shots by six (6) months of age. A signed animal addendum is required to be on file at our leasing office. A maximum of two (2) pets is allowed. Breed restrictions apply.
We also welcome your domestic pet if it is a bird or fish, with written approval from our on-site management team. No reptiles or exotic animals, please. Fish tanks are not to exceed 55 gallons.
Income Requirements

Nestled among trees on the north side of Bellingham, Canterbury Court Apartments offer a serene retreat surrounded by lush greenery and thoughtfully maintained landscapes. Meandering garden paths, wide-open lawns, and vibrant seasonal blooms invite residents to unwind and enjoy the outdoors. Each spacious apartment is designed for comfort, with large windows that welcome in natural light, ample closet space, in-unit washers and dryers, and bedrooms comfortably sized to fit a queen-size bed. Residents enjoy thoughtful amenities including free parking, a well-equipped gym, an indoor heated pool, hot tub, and a dry sauna- ideal for cozy Pacific Northwest days. title: HOUSE FOR RENT
description:
The house is located 6 miles from WSU campus. Rent is $910/month (which includes water and sewer), and we ask for first and last month’s rent plus a $750 damage deposit. The house is 590sqft, which includes attic 152sqft of storage space. Approximately 1/3 is kitchen and dining area, 1/3 is bathroom/laundry room and wide hallway (with room for a small desk, table or couch just inside the entryway), and 1/3 is a multipurpose room or bedroom with a high vaulted ceiling. The ladder to the sleeping loft is in this room. Two moveable wardrobe cabinets are provided. WiFi is available via landline DSL or FirstStep dish link.
This house is well suited to grad students, writers, musicians, artists, and individuals seeking a unique and quiet pastoral setting with a beautiful view of the South Fork of the Palouse River. No pets allowed, but there is a small herd of 4-6 cows in the neighboring pastures who like being treated like pets.

title: Apartment for rent at THE SILOS
description: Apartment for rent at THE SILOS: A 1-bdrm apt. available immediately. Beautiful unit with radiant floor heating, air conditioning, oak cabinetry, all appliances, on-site parking. Complex set in beautiful gardens, near Latah Trail. Located at 687 Styner Ave, Moscow (accessible via Travois Way). No pets, no smoking, $775. Text BRENDA: show contact info

title: Charming two bedroom house in tranquil neighborhood
description:
Available August 1st, 2026.

This lovely house is located in a pleasant residential neighborhood across the street from East City Park, has well developed landscaping and a secluded back yard.

Locally owned and personally managed.

The Kitchen is large, lots of cupboard space, room for a dining table, and a fully functional Vintage extra wide range. For safety and convenience, we also added a range hood and fan to this kitchen.

We just got rid of the old oil furnace that used to heat this house and installed a lovely gas heating stove in the living room, much more economical and attractive. It is not in the overview photos but I have included a separate photo of that, and you'll put things together when we do the walk though together.


We upgraded to a new faucet set on the kitchen sink, however kept the lovely farmhouse sink with its convenient drain board. Back bedroom has a cedar lined closet.

Front bedroom has varnished knotty pine walls and we recently added a new 5x7 foot walk-in closet.

Bath has been remodeled with a new, beautiful, tile floor, a water saver toilet and a modern bath fan, and includes washer dryer hookups.

Back yard boasts a laundry clothes line and a private, sturdy locking storage shed designated solely for this apartment. A second shed holds yard tools provided by the owner for the residents use. Yard care is shared by all our residents here. (A third shed goes with the mother- in-law apartment in the rear of this house).

The graveled driveway up front is dedicated for Off street parking just for the front house, and has a row of bountiful, mature prune plum trees beside it.

There is a mother in law apartment at the back corner of the house, attached to this apartment via a connecting hallway. (The second driveway off the back alley is dedicated for use only by residents of the Mother-in-Law apartment).

This front house shares no back-to-back walls with the rear apartment, so is reasonably quiet and private. Rent $1400./mo. Lease goes through July 31st 2027, with the option of yearly renewals after that time.

Refundable Security Deposit $1300.00, Refundable Cleaning Deposit $500. We do not ask for last month's rent in advance. No smoke/pet.

Drive by viewings 203 S. Monroe. (Please leave the current residents in peace.)

We've made so many improvements that we have not yet had a chance to update all the photos in our photo record, so showings will make it all clear to you if you're interested in this place.

I have included a detailed image of the range, which has 4 burners, and the accessory griddle pictured. It also has a cute little night light built into the head panel. When not in use, the griddle can be stored in one of the drawers.

Also we have been upgrading most of the light fixtures there, using genuine 1930's era lights that have been restored and rewired. I'll include separate photos of those.

On the floor plan, each background square is one square foot.
For more information or appointment to view, call Roberta at show contact info (land line phone won't do texts, sorry) ... or reply by email.
